visualizegate.gates.rename.hint: Gate name (Enter to save, Esc to cancel)
visualizegate.cmd.wrongdim: Back-calculate works only in the Overworld or Nether
visualizegate.cmd.existing: Existing gate within %s blocks (red, pull-in warning) in %s at %s, %s, %s
visualizegate.cmd.new: New gate expected (green) — build in %s at %s, %s, %s
visualizegate.cmd.unconfirmed: Note: far side unobserved — cannot rule out an existing gate
visualizegate.cmd.added: Wireframe added. Use /vg clean to remove.
visualizegate.cmd.cleanall: Turned off all /vg overlays and cleared %s wireframe(s)
visualizegate.help.dock: /vg dock — expand/collapse the full menu (perf + gate state + notes) [%s]
visualizegate.help.detail: /vg detail — toggle the point-cloud panel overlay detail [%s]
visualizegate.pc.hud.title: Point cloud
visualizegate.pc.hud.empty: No data — open the hub and Re-analyze
visualizegate.pc.hud.legacy: Point cloud: GPU3D N/A on this version
visualizegate.perf.cpu.title: CPU %s%% · sys %s%%
visualizegate.card.linked.title: Links to an existing gate
visualizegate.card.linked.offset_big: Large offset: may be pulled to another gate
visualizegate.card.will_create.title: A new gate will be created
visualizegate.card.will_create.desc: No existing gate ahead. Stepping through creates one with no offset.
visualizegate.card.unknown.title: Link target unconfirmed
visualizegate.card.unknown.desc: Far side unexplored. Visit it to determine the link.
visualizegate.card.cave.risk: May generate underground / in a cave (~%s below surface)
visualizegate.card.cave.nether_enclosed: Nether side is generated enclosed (low cave risk)
visualizegate.card.cave.detail: Target Y %s vs est. surface Y %s
visualizegate.card5.headline: %s — %s
visualizegate.guide.title: How to use
visualizegate.guide.1.title: What VisualizeGate does
visualizegate.guide.1.body1: It shows how your Nether gates connect, in color.
visualizegate.guide.2.title: The 5 colors (dock / point cloud)
visualizegate.guide.2.body1: The dock and point cloud color each gate's state:
visualizegate.guide.3.title: How it looks in the world
visualizegate.guide.3.body1: Look at a portal: its link state shows
visualizegate.guide.3.body2: as a colored line. Colors = the 5 states (prev page).
visualizegate.guide.3.note: Look at a portal → state shows in color
visualizegate.guide.4.title: Plan with flint & steel
visualizegate.guide.5.title: The dock (top-left)
visualizegate.guide.5.body1: A quiet one-line bar; expand for details.
visualizegate.guide.5.body2: Open/close with /vg dock or a key binding.
visualizegate.guide.6.title: The hub (V) and /vg
visualizegate.guide.6.body1: Press V for the hub, or type /vg commands.
